events.title: HIRE Reentry Resource Fair — Orange County
events.description: She Rises participated as a community resource provider at the 4th Annual H.I.R.E. Reentry Resource Fair.
events.details: She Rises participated as a community resource provider at the 4th Annual H.I.R.E. Reentry Resource Fair. We connected with justice-impacted individuals, shared information about our transitional housing program, and distributed empowerment and reentry resources.
highlights: Outreach to individuals seeking housing and employment support
Provided resource materials and intake information

events.title: RCC Fall Festival Resource Fair — Riverside County
events.description: She Rises hosted a resource booth at the RCC Rising Scholars Fall Festival.
events.details: She Rises hosted a resource booth at the RCC Rising Scholars Fall Festival. We offered empowerment resources, program materials, and on-site guidance for women seeking support and stability.
highlights: Outreach to justice-impacted women and families
Shared information on transitional housing and services
